title: Vivy: Fluorite Eye’s Song
description:
In a future where artificial intelligence has become part of everyday life, Vivy is the world’s first autonomous AI capable of expressing genuine emotions through singing. Working at the NiaLand amusement park, her mission is simple: make people happy with her songs. However, her peaceful existence changes when an AI from one hundred years in the future suddenly appears and warns her that humanity will eventually be destroyed by a massive war between humans and AI.

Together with the mysterious AI known as Matsumoto, Vivy begins traveling across important moments in history to prevent the catastrophic future from occurring. As she faces dangerous missions, emotional conflicts, and difficult choices over the course of a century, Vivy gradually begins questioning the meaning of emotions, purpose, and what it truly means to have a heart. Combining science fiction, action, emotional storytelling, and breathtaking animation, Vivy: Fluorite Eye’s Song delivers a powerful story about humanity, identity, sacrifice, and hope.
